globalHeaders.content-security-policy: default-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: https: blob:; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co
